sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Click a g marker to remove a cross
print("Clicking g at (15, 32)...")
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 15, 'col': 32}])

seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
N_nodes = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"N nodes after: {len(N_nodes)}")
for n in N_nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    center_r = (min(rows) + max(rows)) // 2
    center_c = (min(cols) + max(cols)) // 2
    print(f"  center~({center_r}, {center_c})")

# Continue the loop
for iteration in range(5):
    seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
    N_nodes = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'N']
    print(f"\nIteration: N nodes = {len(N_nodes)}")
    
    if len(N_nodes) == 0:
        print("All crosses removed!")
        break
    
    # Try each cross until one generates g markers
    found_g = False
    for n in N_nodes:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        center_r = (min(rows) + max(rows)) // 2
        center_c = (min(cols) + max(cols)) // 2
        
        print(f"  Trying cross at ({center_r}, {center_c})")
        result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': center_r, 'col': center_c}])
        
        seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
        g_nodes = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'g']
        
        if g_nodes:
            print(f"    Generated {len(g_nodes)} g markers")
            # Click first g marker
            g0 = g_nodes[0]
            b = g0['boundary']
            gr = (b[0][0] + b[-1][0]) // 2
            gc = (b[0][1] + b[-1][1]) // 2
            print(f"    Clicking g at ({gr}, {gc})")
            result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': gr, 'col': gc}])
            
            seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
            N_nodes = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'N']
            print(f"    N nodes after: {len(N_nodes)}")
            found_g = True
            
            if result.get('level_completed') or result.get('done'):
                print("Level completed!")
                break
            break
    
    if not found_g:
        print("  No cross generated g markers, trying ACTION7...")
        result = action([('ACTION7')])
        seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
        N_nodes = [n for n in seg if n['color'] == 'N']
        print(f"  N nodes after ACTION7: {len(N_nodes)}")
        if result.get('level_completed') or result.get('done'):
            print("Level completed!")
            break

print(f"\nFinal: N={len([n for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N'])}")
print(f"Score: {last_action_result.get('score')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
